svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="DomainEvents" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-634" dy="-175" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1500" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;align=left;" value="Domain Events — Order Choreography (logical, in-process state changes)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="900" x="60" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;fontColor=#666666;" value="No message bus — these are logical lifecycle events raised by service state transitions; consumers are called in-process (audit, notifications, settlement, ratings)." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="1100" x="60" y="52" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="OrderCreated
(Checkout)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="60" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="PaymentConfirmed
(Payment)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="290" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="OrderAccepted
(Vendor)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="520" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="ReadyForPickup
(Vendor)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="750" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="CourierAssigned
(Dispatch)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="980" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="OrderPickedUp
(Delivery)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="980" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="OutForDelivery
(Delivery)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="750" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="OrderDelivered
(OTP confirmed)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="520" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="evR" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="RefundRequested
(reject / fail)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="290" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cons" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="In-process consumers" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="1070" x="60" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cn" parent="cons" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="NotificationService
(push / status updates)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="220" x="30" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cf" parent="cons" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="FinanceService
(Commission / settlement)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="220" x="290" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cr" parent="cons" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="RatingService
(request review)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="220" x="550" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ca" parent="cons" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="AuditLog
(admin/ops/finance actions)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="220" x="810" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c1" edge="1" parent="1" source="ev1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="ev2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c2" edge="1" parent="1" source="ev2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="ev3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c3" edge="1" parent="1" source="ev3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="ev4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c4" edge="1" parent="1" source="ev4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="ev5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c5" edge="1" parent="1" source="ev5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="ev6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c6" edge="1" parent="1" source="ev6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="ev7"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c7" edge="1" parent="1" source="ev7" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="ev8"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c8" edge="1" parent="1" source="ev2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;dashed=1;strokeColor=#b85450;" target="evR" value="payment failed /
vendor rejected"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d1" edge="1" parent="1" source="ev8" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" target="cn" value="subscribes (most events)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d2" edge="1" parent="1" source="ev8" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" target="cf" value="on Delivered"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d3" edge="1" parent="1" source="ev8" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" target="cr" value="on Delivered"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d4" edge="1" parent="1" source="evR" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;dashed=1;strokeColor=#b85450;" target="cf" value="refund → settlement"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
